Chris Wahlfeldt

See my work Get in touch

About

Developer with over 11 years of experience building websites and custom applications, primarily in an agency setting. I work a lot with WordPress, building themes, plugins, and custom blocks, and bring a broad mix of front-end and back-end experience. I focus on practical, maintainable solutions that perform well and feel good to use.

WordPress PHP JavaScript React Node.js CSS HTML Git REST APIs Linux Docker Python
